TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_bnkisan, title = bnkisan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/bnkisan} }

S.FORM: bnkisan ini mu yngiy ke, pnongan mu knayan na bnkis ta yow na pu'ing kinholan ta ita tayal. uba mu kman ma: ita tayal ga knahun ta alang na Pinsbkan kwara ta ma, kyan utux wan mbka na tyaba btunux, mhtuw utux likuy ro utux kneril, knahun cka btunux ma, sa'ing naha kssli' ro wa so'un. babow nya laga piyux ci la'iy naha ro mbhuyow Tayal la. ini ci tna' kki'an naha, ro pnmahan naha uy la. mtuli' tugal mrhow, sgleng ita Tayal, lalu na utux mrhow ga Lkbuta, utux hi ga Lkmyabux, binah hi ga Lkmayan, naha hiya ga spiyang bnkisan na ita Tayal lela.

bnkisan ini mu yngiy ke, pnongan mu knayan na bnkis ta yow na pu'ing kinholan ta ita tayal. uba mu kman ma: ita tayal ga knahun ta alang na Pinsbkan kwara ta ma, kyan utux wan mbka na tyaba btunux, mhtuw utux likuy ro utux kneril, knahun cka btunux ma, sa'ing naha kssli' ro wa so'un. babow nya laga piyux ci la'iy naha ro mbhuyow Tayal la. ini ci tna' kki'an naha, ro pnmahan naha uy la. mtuli' tugal mrhow, sgleng ita Tayal, lalu na utux mrhow ga Lkbuta, utux hi ga Lkmyabux, binah hi ga Lkmayan, naha hiya ga spiyang bnkisan na ita Tayal lela.
S.PHON: βnkis~ɕan ini mu jŋij ke, pnoŋan mu knajan na βnkis~ɕ ta jow na puʔiŋ kinħolan ta ita tajal. uβa mu kman ma: ita tajal ɣa knaħun ta alaŋ na pins~ɕβkan kwara ta ma, kjan utux wan mβka na tjaβa βtunux, mħtuw utux likuj ro utux kneril, knaħun ʦ~ʨka βtunux ma, s~ɕaʔiŋ naħa ks~ɕs~ɕliʔ ro wa s~ɕoʔun. βaβow nja laɣa pijux ʦ~ʨi laʔij naħa ro mβħujow tajal la. ini ʦ~ʨi tnaʔ kkiʔan naħa, ro pnmaħan naħa uj la. mtuliʔ tuɣal mrħow, s~ɕɣleŋ ita tajal, lalu na utux mrħow ɣa lkβuta, utux ħi ɣa lkmjaβux, βinaħ ħi ɣa lkmajan, naħa ħija ɣa s~ɕpijaŋ βnkis~ɕan na ita tajal lela.
